note: Verified production function inventory for the first Scena UI. Deployed status is based on the live Supabase project; end-to-end status additionally requires a completed customer-facing path.

statusLegend.source_created: Tracked source exists but the function is not deployed.
statusLegend.deployed: ACTIVE in the production Supabase project.
statusLegend.end_to_end_verified: Deployed and completed through the intended customer-facing path.
statusLegend.legacy: Deployed only for compatibility; new UI code must not call it.

/workspace-context.description: Load all authorized Personal and Team Workspaces, entitlements, and selected Workspace; select persists the preference.

/asset-upload.description: Private Asset source upload, finalization, processing state, list/detail, signed reads, and archive.

/board-interaction.description: Board draft list/create/get/save/revision/archive with optimistic version conflicts.

/scena-api/v2/*.description: Future central manager router. No production frontend may call it.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: billing-checkout
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: Stripe Checkout registration and session creation.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: screen-register
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: Display registration, device credential, and pairing code.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: presentation-upload
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: Legacy LXC presentation path; forbidden for new Asset UI.

supabase.authentication: Native Supabase Auth with production PKCE callback.
supabase.storage: Private scena-assets bucket using signed uploads and reads.
supabase.database: Workspace-isolated RLS and explicit Edge Function authorization.

proxmox.mediaWorker: scena-media-01 polls outbound over HTTPS and processes one job at a time.
